headline_results.query_optimize: mixed/preliminary: without-stop passed once, with-stop had one missing-artifact failure and one pass; repetition was stopped for PR prep
headline_results.headless_terminal: valid negative candidate: without Meta-Harness reproduced the prior proxy/localhost 503 failure; with Meta-Harness set NO_PROXY and installed pexpect but still failed interactive/background tests with reward 0.0
headline_results.continued_search: largest-eigenval, chess-best-move, break-filter-js-from-html, configure-git-webserver, count-dataset-tokens, dna-insert, filter-js-from-html, gcode-to-text, write-compressor, mteb-leaderboard, raman-fitting, and feal-differential-cryptanalysis were probed after the PR opened. The chess-best-move, break-filter paired attempt, and mteb-leaderboard are trajectory-only/invalid for clean reward comparison. configure-git-webserver, dna-insert, filter-js-from-html, gcode-to-text, write-compressor, raman-fitting, and largest-eigenval are valid with-Meta-Harness verifier failures. count-dataset-tokens is a valid timeout-upload pass and feal-differential-cryptanalysis is a valid stop-artifact pass; together they add two tasks to the current m count.
